name: Monolith-light
author: ImAsra
description: Monochrome white and charcoal neumorphic theme with circular record player esque album grid patches.

1.2.7: Fix: row controls (favorite/heart, star rating, bulk-select checkbox, preview) inside track rows can be clicked reliably again. The press animation was scaling the whole row on :active, which shifted controls out from under the cursor mid-click and silently swallowed the click.
1.2.6: Fix: collapsed sidebar nav buttons are now square and icon-sized.
1.2.5: Fix: the album rail's prev/next arrows work again. The card shadow now gets room inside the rail instead of switching off its overflow, which had disabled the arrows.
1.2.4: New: player-bar glow when playing (player-bar + ::before glow + accent text shadow for playing track).
Fix: allow album-card box-shadow glow to render above album cards (overflow: visible).
Add breathing room for first row of album cards.
